headline: Trump Bought the Software Stock Slump—and More Revelations From His Trades
summary: President Donald Trump has been busy in the stock market.  Trump disclosed purchases and sales of hundreds of millions of dollars worth of U.S. stocks in the first quarter, according to a disclosure released by the U.S. Office of Government Ethics.  Trump purchased between $1 million and $5 million worth of  ServiceNow Adobe Workday  on Feb. 10, the disclosure revealed.

headline: ServiceNow AI Partnerships Aim To Turn Pilot Projects Into Core Workflows
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) and Accenture launched a forward-deployed engineering program to embed AI-native teams directly into client environments. The program focuses on moving agentic AI and workflow automation projects from pilots into full production at enterprise scale. ServiceNow expanded its partnership with FedEx Dataworks, integrating real-time logistics data into Source-to-Pay workflows. The FedEx Dataworks integration targets automated responses to supply disruptions and more...

headline: Experian Partners With ServiceNow to Scale Trusted Decisioning to Agentic AI
summary: LONDON, May 15, 2026--Experian, the global data and technology company, and ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW), the AI control tower for business reinvention, today unveil a new global multi-year partnership which harnesses the power of autonomous AI agents across platforms, helping businesses make faster and smarter decisions at scale.
